Product overview

What Are the Multivitamins and Minerals Tablets?

Our Multivitamin and Mineral Tablets offer a premium blend of 27 vital vitamins & minerals in each tablet for your all-round comprehensive care.

While you can derive these nutrients from food, getting them all in the right amounts from diet alone can be challenging. That’s where our multivitamin tablets come to the rescue!

With a vegan and gluten-free formula, this multivitamin supplement is perfect for everyone, whether you're on a plant-based diet or not. Each bottle contains 400 tablets, offering over a year’s supply of essential nutrients - no worries about restocking anytime soon!

Benefits of Our Multivitamin Tablets
  • Check out how the top multivitamins and minerals in our high-strength tablets support your physical and mental well-being all year round -
  • Vitamins A, B6, B12, C and D3, biotin, folate and zinc contribute to the normal function of the immune system
  • Vitamins B6, B12, C, niacin, folate and magnesium contribute to the reduction of tiredness and fatigue
  • Vitamins B6, B12 and C, riboflavin, niacin, magnesium, iron, calcium, manganese, biotin and iodine contribute to normal energy-yielding metabolism
  • Vitamins B6, B12, C, folate, magnesium and biotin contribute to normal psychological function
  • Vitamins B6 and C, biotin, magnesium, potassium and iodine contribute to the normal functioning of the nervous system
  • Vitamin A, biotin, riboflavin, iodine and zinc contribute to the maintenance of normal skin
  • Biotin and zinc contribute to the maintenance of normal hair
  • Vitamin A and zinc contribute to the maintenance of normal vision
  • Iodine, iron and zinc contribute to normal cognitive function
  • Vitamin C contributes to the normal collagen formation for the normal function of bones, gums, teeth, skin and blood vessels
  • Vitamin B6 contributes to the regulation of hormonal activity
  • Choline contributes to the maintenance of normal liver function
  • Iodine contributes to the normal production of thyroid hormones and normal thyroid function
  • Calcium is needed for the maintenance of normal bones and teeth
  • Pantothenic acid contributes to normal mental performance
  • Potassium contributes to the maintenance of normal blood pressure
  • Iron contributes to the normal formation of red blood cells and haemoglobin
  • Copper contributes to normal hair pigmentation and skin pigmentation
  • Selenium contributes to normal spermatogenesis and normal thyroid function
  • Chromium contributes to the maintenance of normal blood glucose levels
Why Choose WeightWorld's Multivitamins And Minerals Tablets?

You’ll find multiple multivitamin supplements on the market, but not all live up to the expectation. Here’s what makes our Multivitamins and Minerals Tablets stand out from the rest!

  • Power-packed formula consisting of 27 vitamins and minerals in each tablet, while most multivitamin supplements contain 10-12 nutrients
  • Comes in fresh mint flavour , a great alternative to the regular multivitamin tablets with an unpleasant taste
  • 100% natural and free from GMOs and Magnesium Stearate so you can enjoy the benefits without encountering any known side effects
  • GMP-certified for reliable consumption by you and your loved ones
  • Vegan and free from gluten and lactose , ensuring it’s suitable for people with varying dietary preferences
  • 400 tablets per bottle for more than one whole year’s supply of nutritional goodness
  • Backed by a 90-day money-back guarantee , allowing you to try the tablets risk-free
How to use

Take 1 tablet daily with a full glass of water, preferably with a main meal.

Ingredients

Dicalcium Phosphate., Microcrystalline Cellulose, Polyvinylpyrrolidone, Talc, E 468, Peppermint

Nutritional information

Serving Size: 1 Tablets Servings per Container : 400

Amount per servingAmount%NRV
Vitamin C (Ascorbic Acid)84 mg100
Magnesium56 mg14
Potassium Chloride40.15 mcg2
Vitamin E (Dl-Alpha Tocopherol Acetate)12 mg100
Vitamin B3 (Niacin)16 mg100
Iron (Ferrous Fumarate)14 mg100
Zinc Citrate10 mg100
Calcium Carbonate8.37 mg8
Vitamin B5 (Pantothenic Acid As D-Calcium Panthonate)6 mg100
Manganese2 mg100
Vitamin B2 (Riboflavin)1.4 mg100
Vitamin B6 (Pyridoxine Hydrochloride)1.4 mg100
Vitamin B1 (Thiamin)1.1 mg100
Copper Gluconate1 mg100
Vitamin A (Retinyl Acetate)800 mcg100
Sodium Chloride254 mcg
Vitamin B9 (Folic Acid)200 mcg0
Iodine150 mcg100
Selenium55 mcg100
Vitamin B12 (as Cyanocobalamin)50 mcg2000
Vitamin B7 (Biotin)50 mcg100
Chromium (as Chromium Picolinate)40 mcg0
Boron0 mcg0
Choline Bitartrate15 mcg0
Molybdenum10 mcg20
Vitamin D3 (Source : Lichen)5 mcg100
Vitamin K2 (MK-7)5 mcg8
Advice and storage

Do not exceed the recommended daily dose. Food supplements must not be used as a substitute for a varied and balanced diet and a healthy lifestyle. If you are pregnant, breastfeeding, taking any medications, or are under medical supervision, please consult a doctor or healthcare professional before use. Discontinue use and consult a doctor if any adverse reactions occur. Not intended for use by persons under the age of 18.

Store in a cool, dry place. Keep out of reach of children. For best before end see the base.
